title: The Galactic Search for Chicky
summary: When Chicky is captured and taken across the galaxy, Captain Hand Creature and Pilot Isabella assemble a motley crew to track her down. From the red deserts of Mars to the sweltering plains of Venus and the icy darkness of Pluto, the team follows a trail of secret messages and tiny footprints. Their journey leads them toward the mysterious Planet of the Mookers in a race to bring their friend home safely.

highlightQuote.text: I conduct people who want to get out of their seats... and jump around.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, it's time to begin our space mission. Hand Creature's the captain.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hand Creature. We're going to rescue Chicky.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, we're going to rescue Chicky! Right. Let's assemble our crew. Excuse you, Izzy. You're the pilot.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Llama, you're coming with us on the crew and you too Mr. Mischief Mole.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Llama says 'Great, what's my job?'.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Your job is to unload and snacks.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Unloading snacks. Got it. And the Mischief Mole says 'Reporting for duty, what's our job?'.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You're reporting for duty.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That just means we showed up. But what do we do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You may... and you may... here's your turn my help... this is a sparkle pop that goes in the mouth.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, a sparkle pop that goes in the mouth for people that get hurt? Okay. Got it, says Disco and Disco. And Hatty Mouse says 'What's my job?'.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Your job is to throw out for collecting space rocks.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, collecting space rocks. Got it. And Avery is coming on the mission as well, what's her job?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Her job is to chew on her bug.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: To chew on her... you got that Avery, your job is to chew on your bug. She's already doing her job. Good job Avery. Okay, and Captain Hand Creature says 'The crew is all present. Everyone strap into your seats and we'll prepare for liftoff'.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wait before... Yes Pilot Isabella... I... 1, 2, 3, 4, 5...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 6, 7, 8, 9, 10. Blastoff! And then there was a huge noise as the engines of the spaceship lit and there was fire and smoke shooting out the bottom of the spaceship and whoosh it pushed them straight up into the air and they were flying straight away from the Earth to their first destination. And Hand Creature says 'Uh, Pilot Isabella, what is our first destination?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Destination Mars! Set the course for Mars and we will fly there! And Pilot Isabella presses her special button to fly the ship to Mars. *Whoosh*.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm the conductor.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Christmas Mouse is the conductor? What does that mean? What's your job Christmas Mouse?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I conduct people who want to get out of their seats.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You conduct people who want to... Does anyone want to get out of their seats while we're flying to Mars?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And jump around.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And jump around. Oh, we can jump around on our spaceship while we're flying. That's a good idea. Lieutenant Avery, do you have a question? Oh, okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm the tencer. She's the tencer to make everybody's beds.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, she makes everybody's beds? Oh okay, good. Lieutenant Avery, good job chewing on your bug. Okay, and now we're flying to Mars. *Whoosh*. And everyone's out of their seats jumping around and then Captain Hand Creature says 'Everyone, we are approaching the planet Mars. If you look straight ahead you will see a little red ball among the stars. That is the planet Mars and we are hoping that perhaps that is where we will find Chicky'.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And... Finn. Finn's the research collector.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Finn's the research collector. What's he doing now?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He's just sniffing around.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, he's doing sniffing research. That's very good, Lieutenant Finn Cat. Oh, it needs charging. Okay. Our space Yoda is out of space batteries. I can charge it. You can? Here I'll give you the cable. Plug it right in and then we'll sit it up on the shelf. Oh, Lieutenant Avery has dropped her space bug. Here you go.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now Finn's laying on the windowsill.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Hand Creature says 'Pilot Izzy, please select a landing site on the surface of Mars for us to land and search for Chicky'.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: On the red bolt of Mars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: On the what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Red bolt of Mars. That's the side of Mars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The side, oh okay. Okay, take us in for a landing, Pilot Izzy.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: This is the button for land.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, press it. *Whoosh*. And the spaceship flies down to the surface of Mars and they see Mars getting bigger and bigger and bigger until they can see all the mountains and rocks and dust storms and all of the red and orange parts of Mars getting closer and closer and then boop they landed. And Captain Hand Creature says 'Okay everyone, it's time to make a plan for searching. Who will go out first?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Me!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Pilot Isabella. Get your spacesuit on and go down onto the surface of Mars and search for Chicky. And Pilot Izzy gets her spacesuit on and goes to search.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No Chicky here.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, report back to the ship. What did you see?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No Chickies. Did you search for any clues? I found one of the clues.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what was that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was a space blanket.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A space blanket. Hmm. Does it look like Chicky might have used it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now wait a minute. I see something written on that space blanket. It might be a message from Chicky.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Where's it written? No messages. No messages.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, but it's a secret message.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Is it just pretend?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It's just pretend, that's right.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I can read it! I can read it!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, who's that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Officer Mouse. Can you read the mousy? Can you read the message? Aha, there is a secret message here. It says 'Help! Help! They're taking me to a different planet. It's a planet that's very fuzzy, I guess. I hope someone finds me. From Chicky.' Well, this seems to be a message from Chicky and she's being taken to another... Oh, Avery, I know that's very upsetting but we're going to find Chicky, I promise. Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, I didn't remember to find any clues on Mars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, we found the message. That's a good clue. Now we just have to find the fuzzy planet that Chicky was taken to.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We're on Venus.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I thought we were on Mars.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now we're on Venus.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, now we flew to Venus. *Whoosh*. And we land on the surface of Venus where everything is very hot and dry. Oh, you're going out in your spacesuit again. Oh, Christmas Mouse is going out this time. Good luck, Christmas Mouse, in your search.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No Chicky and no clue in here. Dad, I found a clue of Chicky. It's footprints.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Footprints. What shape are they?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They're shaped like Chicky feet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They're shaped like Chicky feet. That's very interesting. But you didn't find Chicky at the end of the trail of footprints?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's Mission Control. We already found something of a clue.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Uh, Mission Control here. I'm glad to hear you found a clue. What did you find?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Some footprints.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Some footprints. Very interesting. And where did they lead?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They lead to Venus. Aha. Well, good luck in your mission, wherever it takes you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What other planet?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: We're on Pluto.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now we're on Pluto. *Whoosh*. We land on the surface of Pluto and Pluto is a tiny, dark, and cold planet where everything is black and purple and there's rocks everywhere and that's about it. Who would like to go and walk on the surface of Pluto and see if they can find anything hidden there? Avery, you found your toes. That's an important thing to find. Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Uncle Bill!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Uncle Bill. I've found a clue. Avery's rattle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Avery's rattle? Avery, how'd your rattle get onto Pluto? Well, we better give it back to Avery. Here you go. There's your rattle. Do you like it? There you go. You got it. Do you want to give it a taste? Or a shake?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I gave it a shake, Uncle Bill.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes, says Uncle Bill.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm gonna call Mission Control again. Uncle Bill already found a clue. Uncle Bill found a clue.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: This is Mission Control. What did Uncle Bill find?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I found Avery's rattle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Avery's rattle. Congratulations. I bet Avery is very happy to have her rattle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A message is coming in from Mission Control.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What is it?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Uh, we have some important information for you. Chicky's message about a fuzzy planet led us to search our database of different planets to see which one might be the one that she's being taken to and we found that there's one planet that is fuzzy enough to be the one. It's the planet of the Mookers. Please go there and see if there's any clues of where Chicky might be.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Not yet, we're not there yet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, good luck. And Captain Hand Creature says 'Well everyone, are we done here on Pluto? Because it sounds like we should visit the planet of the Mookers'.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We're not there yet, Hand Creature.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. Are there any more things to... Uh, just gotta get everyone back on the ship and make sure we have Avery's bug and her rattle and... Oh, and Lieutenant Llama says 'Excuse me everyone, it's time for a snack. Gather around for your space snacks'.

characters.name: Hand Creature
characters.description: The brave captain of the space mission.

characters.name: Chicky
characters.description: A steadfast mole friend who served as the group’s living anchor, keeping everyone united through the simple, vital act of holding hands; they have been spirited away to a distant planet and now await a rescue to restore the broken chain.

characters.name: Pilot Isabella
characters.description: The skilled pilot of the crew's spaceship.

characters.name: Llama
characters.description: A specialized member of the space exploration crew, tasked with hauling interstellar freight through the airlocks and maintaining the team’s morale by managing and serving the vessel's supply of snacks and provisions.

characters.name: Mr. Mischief Mole
characters.description: A dedicated crew member reporting for duty on the mission.

characters.name: Hatty Mouse
characters.description: A mouse whose job is to collect rocks from the surface of space.

characters.name: Lieutenant Avery
characters.description: A crew member who chews on her space bug and makes everyone's beds.

characters.name: Christmas Mouse
characters.description: The conductor who manages passengers and leads jumping activities.

characters.name: Finn
characters.description: A resident of Cat World and loyal companion to Mama, Finncat is a meticulous research collector who documents the world through investigative sniffing. Alongside their peer Silver, they navigate their domain with scholarly curiosity, often pausing mid-voyage for a sudden, dramatic flop. While currently thwarted by the formidable challenge of an unopened food can, this diligent scholar occasionally graces the room for a fleeting minute during storytelling, lending a brief, discerning presence to the narrative before returning to their investigations.

characters.name: Space Yoda
characters.description: A figure who helps with the mission until their batteries run low.

characters.name: Officer Mouse
characters.description: A character capable of reading secret messages from other planets.

characters.name: Uncle Bill
characters.description: A diligent crew member and master Lego architect, this former visitor to Balloon World crafts perfectly symmetrical stairways and shapes iridescent purple slime into glistening rocket ships. Renowned for a sharp eye that once pierced Pluto’s crystalline shadows, they recently turned their gaze toward the forest’s depths, acting as a compassionate friend to discover and tend to a sick creature hidden in the brush. Whether providing blocks for builders, weaving bedtime stories, or offering woodland mercy, they remain a helpful soul. Yet, between these moments of structural precision and quiet rescue, they harbor a penchant for deep rest, often found napping peacefully inside the colorful confines of a toy container, tucked away amidst the playthings they share.

characters.name: Mission Control
characters.description: The central base that communicates vital data and planet locations.

characters.name: Disco
characters.description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

places.name: Earth
places.description: The ancestral cradle of humanity and the definitive anchor for the galactic mission, this rocky world pulses with a hidden molten core. As the home planet where the journey begins and ends, it serves as the foundational site for the Floofers’ true home and new school, bridging an ancient legacy with the education of a new generation.

places.name: Mars
places.description: Serving as the home of Julian and the primary destination for the Floofers’ quest for the mookball, this primordial red world hosts the Red Bolt landing site. Defined by the rhythmic thunder of giant volcanoes and the jagged edges of ancient impact craters, the ash-shrouded landscape rests under a hazy pink sky in a haunting silence—a world devoid of other human life where only the fire and dust endure.

places.name: Red Bolt of Mars
places.description: A specific search location on the side of the planet Mars.

places.name: Venus
places.description: A distant, parched world where ship sensors track a critical and relentless rise in temperature across the empty expanse; here, amidst the lifeless, searing dust, the crew follows a haunting trail of footprints.

places.name: Pluto
places.description: A tiny, cold planet where Avery's rattle was found.

places.name: Planet of the Mookers
places.description: An enigmatic alien world defined by its fuzzy yet curiously slimy surface, this planet serves as the ancestral cradle of the Mookers and the site of Chicky’s destined path. Strewn with the colossal remains of giant fossils, the realm was recently scouted by Seeker and Buddy and documented in the Seeker’s potion closet; it remains accessible only to those who imbibe a specific purple alchemical elixir.
